svg.text: Detecta: WRITE · WRITE_DACL · WRITE_OWNER · GenericAll · GenericWrite sobre GPOs.
Resultado → copia GUID → FIND MACHINES (scope) → ABUSE tab (SharpGPOAbuse)
bloodyAD --host 192.168.1.10 -d corp.local -u svc_backup -p :8846f7eaee8fb117ad06bdd830b7586c get writable --otype GPO
— writable GPO linked to workstations. Proceed to ABUSE tab.
Use FIND MACHINES to resolve scope (GUID → OUs → computers + risk scoring).
all tools run from Linux attacker
